positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a celestial raccoon exploring a miniature moonscape. The raccoon is rendered in a clean, kawaii style with bioluminescent glowing accents (electric blue and lime green) emanating from its tail and paw pads. It is seated amidst oversized, stylized cartoon flora—mushrooms and ferns that glow softly. The composition is centered and highly symmetrical, creating a strong, appealing silhouette suitable for repeating pattern printing. The background should be deep, cosmic indigo gradients, with sparse, geometric constellations rendered in gold foil texture. Studio lighting, vector art feel, high contrast, kawaii aesthetic, symmetrical, apparel print ready, minimalist detail, flat graphic design, 3D render style.
